name: signalbot
description: Read and summarize local Signal Desktop conversations through a local MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Read and summarize local Signal Desktop messages.
interface.longDescription: Signalbot gives Codex local MCP tools and a skill for fetching Signal Desktop conversation messages, filtering by sender or mentions, rendering transcripts, summarizing context, and drafting replies.
defaultPrompt: Summarize yesterday's messages from a Signal group.
Draft a reply using Signal and project context.
